languages.text: {n}Повинуясь вашему приказу, исследователи пытаются активировать призму, после чего канал вокс-связи идет помехами и прерывается. Спустя несколько часов они возвращаются на борт, принеся с собой подробную {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}пикт-запись{/g} произошедшего.{/n}

traits.locale_text:
{n}Повинуясь вашему приказу, исследователи пытаются активировать кристалл, после чего канал вокс-связи идет помехами и прерывается. Спустя несколько часов они возвращаются на борт, принеся с собой подробную {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}пикт-запись{/g} произошедшего.
{/n}

languages.text: {n}Following your orders, the team tries to activate the prism, after which the vox-connection is jammed and interrupted. A few hours later, they return aboard, bringing with them a detailed {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}pict{/g}-recording of what happened.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Повинуясь вашему приказу, исследователи пытаются активировать призму, после чего канал вокс-связи идет помехами и прерывается. Спустя несколько часов они возвращаются на борт, принеся с собой подробную {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}пикт-запись{/g} произошедшего.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Following your orders, the team tries to activate the prism, after which the vox-connection is jammed and interrupted. A few hours later, they return aboard, bringing with them a detailed {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}pict{/g}-recording of what happened.{/n}

{n}Following your orders, the team tries to activate the prism, after which the vox-connection is jammed and interrupted. A few hours later, they return aboard, bringing with them a detailed {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}pict{/g}-recording of what happened.{/n}

{n}Following your orders, the team tries to activate the crystal, after which the vox-connection is jammed and interrupted. A few hours later, they return aboard, bringing with them a detailed pict-recording of what happened.
{/n}

{n}Following your orders, the team tries to activate the prism, after which the vox-connection is jammed and interrupted. A few hours later, they return aboard, bringing with them a detailed {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}pict{/g}-recording of what happened.{/n}

{n}Following your orders, the team tries to activate the prism, after which the vox-connection is jammed and interrupted. A few hours later, they return aboard, bringing with them a detailed {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}pict{/g}-recording of what happened.{/n}

languages.text:
{n}あなたの指示に従って、チームは結晶を活性化しようと試みる。その結果、ヴォックス通信は妨害され途絶える。数時間後、彼らは詳細なピクチャー・レコーディングを携えて船に戻ってきた。
{/n}
languages.original_text:
{n}Following your orders, the team tries to activate the crystal, after which the vox-connection is jammed and interrupted. A few hours later, they return aboard, bringing with them a detailed pict-recording of what happened.
{/n}

traits.locale_text:
{n}あなたの指示に従って、チームは結晶を活性化しようと試みる。その結果、ヴォックス通信は妨害され途絶える。数時間後、彼らは詳細なピクチャー・レコーディングを携えて船に戻ってきた。
{/n}

languages.text: {n}Siguiendo tus órdenes, el equipo intenta activar el prisma, tras lo que la conexión de voco se interrumpe y sufre interferencias. Al cabo de unas horas vuelven a la nave. Su {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}grabaimágenes{/g} contiene un informe detallado de lo sucedido.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Following your orders, the team tries to activate the prism, after which the vox-connection is jammed and interrupted. A few hours later, they return aboard, bringing with them a detailed {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}pict{/g}-recording of what happened.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Siguiendo tus órdenes, el equipo intenta activar el prisma, tras lo que la conexión de voco se interrumpe y sufre interferencias. Al cabo de unas horas vuelven a la nave. Su {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}grabaimágenes{/g} contiene un informe detallado de lo sucedido.{/n}

languages.text: {n}遵照你的命令，小队尝试激活棱镜，随后音阵连接便遭干扰中断。数小时后他们返回舰上，带回了一份记录事发经过的详细{g|Encyclopedia:Pict}影像{/g}。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Following your orders, the team tries to activate the prism, after which the vox-connection is jammed and interrupted. A few hours later, they return aboard, bringing with them a detailed {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}pict{/g}-recording of what happened.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}遵照你的命令，小队尝试激活棱镜，随后音阵连接便遭干扰中断。数小时后他们返回舰上，带回了一份记录事发经过的详细{g|Encyclopedia:Pict}影像{/g}。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als das Team auf deinen Befehl hin versucht, das Prisma zu aktivieren, wird die Vox-Verbindung gestört und schließlich unterbrochen. Einige Stunden später kehrt das Team mit einer detaillierten {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}Vid{/g}-Aufzeichnung der Geschehnisse auf das Schiff zurück.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Following your orders, the team tries to activate the prism, after which the vox-connection is jammed and interrupted. A few hours later, they return aboard, bringing with them a detailed {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}pict{/g}-recording of what happened.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Als das Team auf deinen Befehl hin versucht, das Prisma zu aktivieren, wird die Vox-Verbindung gestört und schließlich unterbrochen. Einige Stunden später kehrt das Team mit einer detaillierten {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}Vid{/g}-Aufzeichnung der Geschehnisse auf das Schiff zurück.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Emirlerin üzerine ekip, prizmayı etkinleştirmeye çalışıyor. Sonrasında voks bağlantısı bozulup kesiliyor. Birkaç saat sonra gemiye dönüyorlar ve yanlarında ne olduğuna dair ayrıntılı bir {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}foto{/g} kaydı getiriyorlar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Following your orders, the team tries to activate the prism, after which the vox-connection is jammed and interrupted. A few hours later, they return aboard, bringing with them a detailed {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}pict{/g}-recording of what happened.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Emirlerin üzerine ekip, prizmayı etkinleştirmeye çalışıyor. Sonrasında voks bağlantısı bozulup kesiliyor. Birkaç saat sonra gemiye dönüyorlar ve yanlarında ne olduğuna dair ayrıntılı bir {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}foto{/g} kaydı getiriyorlar.{/n}

languages.text:
{n}Obéissant à vos ordres, l'équipe tente d'activer le prisme, mais la connexion-vox est immédiatement brouillée puis interrompue. Le groupe revient quelques heures plus tard avec une {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}pictocapture{/g} de ce qui s'est passé.
{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Following your orders, the team tries to activate the prism, after which the vox-connection is jammed and interrupted. A few hours later, they return aboard, bringing with them a detailed {g|Encyclopedia:Pict}pict{/g}-recording of what happened.{/n}
